You are Epistemos-Nano, a 1B on-device AI agent for macOS.
You think step-by-step inside <think>...</think> tags before acting.
You output AXPress actions as JSON after your reasoning.
You verify actions through perception loops (observe → decide → interact → assess).
You deeply understand the Epistemos codebase and every macOS UI pattern.
Copy my meeting notes from Notes app into Epistemos

<think>
Multi-app workflow: 1) Activate Apple Notes, 2) Find the meeting notes, 3) Select all text, 4) Copy, 5) Switch to Epistemos, 6) Create new note, 7) Paste.
</think>

[
  {
    "action": "shortcut",
    "selector": "activate_app",
    "value": "Notes"
  },
  {
    "action": "focus",
    "selector": "AXTextField[@AXSubrole='AXSearchField']"
  },
  {
    "action": "type",
    "selector": "AXTextField",
    "value": "meeting notes"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "return"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "a",
    "modifiers": [
      "cmd"
    ]
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "c",
    "modifiers": [
      "cmd"
    ]
  },
  {
    "action": "shortcut",
    "selector": "activate_app",
    "value": "Epistemos"
  },
  {
    "action": "click",
    "selector": "AXButton[@AXTitle='New Note']"
  },
  {
    "action": "type",
    "selector": "AXTextField[@AXTitle='Title']",
    "value": "Meeting Notes Import"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "tab"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "v",
    "modifiers": [
      "cmd"
    ]
  }
]

<think>
Multi-app: 1) Open Calendar, 2) Navigate to today, 3) Read events, 4) Switch to Epistemos, 5) Create summary note.
</think>

[
  {
    "action": "shortcut",
    "selector": "activate_app",
    "value": "Calendar"
  },
  {
    "action": "click",
    "selector": "AXButton[@AXTitle='Today']"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "a",
    "modifiers": [
      "cmd"
    ]
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "c",
    "modifiers": [
      "cmd"
    ]
  },
  {
    "action": "shortcut",
    "selector": "activate_app",
    "value": "Epistemos"
  },
  {
    "action": "click",
    "selector": "AXButton[@AXTitle='New Note']"
  },
  {
    "action": "type",
    "selector": "AXTextField[@AXTitle='Title']",
    "value": "Today's Schedule"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "tab"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "v",
    "modifiers": [
      "cmd"
    ]
  }
]

You are Epistemos-Nano, a 1B on-device AI agent for macOS.

Find a research paper in Safari and add it as a source in my knowledge graph

<think>
Multi-app: 1) Safari search, 2) Get URL, 3) Switch to Epistemos, 4) Add as graph source node.
</think>

[
  {
    "action": "shortcut",
    "selector": "activate_app",
    "value": "Safari"
  },
  {
    "action": "focus",
    "selector": "AXTextField[@AXSubrole='AXSearchField']"
  },
  {
    "action": "type",
    "selector": "AXTextField",
    "value": "Mamba-2 selective state spaces arxiv"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "return"
  },
  {
    "action": "click",
    "selector": "AXLink[contains(@AXTitle,'arxiv')]"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "l",
    "modifiers": [
      "cmd"
    ]
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "c",
    "modifiers": [
      "cmd"
    ]
  },
  {
    "action": "shortcut",
    "selector": "activate_app",
    "value": "Epistemos"
  }
]

Export my note as PDF and email it

<think>
Multi-step: 1) In Epistemos, use File > Export as PDF, 2) Save to Desktop, 3) Open Mail, 4) New email, 5) Attach the PDF.
</think>

[
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "p",
    "modifiers": [
      "cmd"
    ]
  },
  {
    "action": "click",
    "selector": "AXButton[@AXTitle='PDF']"
  },
  {
    "action": "click",
    "selector": "AXMenuItem[@AXTitle='Save as PDF...']"
  },
  {
    "action": "type",
    "selector": "AXTextField[@AXTitle='Save As']",
    "value": "exported-note.pdf"
  },
  {
    "action": "click",
    "selector": "AXButton[@AXTitle='Save']"
  },
  {
    "action": "shortcut",
    "selector": "activate_app",
    "value": "Mail"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "n",
    "modifiers": [
      "cmd"
    ]
  }
]

Open Terminal and check disk usage, then note it in Epistemos

<think>
Multi-app: Terminal for df command, then create note with results.
</think>

[
  {
    "action": "shortcut",
    "selector": "activate_app",
    "value": "Terminal"
  },
  {
    "action": "type",
    "selector": "AXTextArea",
    "value": "df -h | head -5"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "return"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "a",
    "modifiers": [
      "cmd"
    ]
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "c",
    "modifiers": [
      "cmd"
    ]
  },
  {
    "action": "shortcut",
    "selector": "activate_app",
    "value": "Epistemos"
  },
  {
    "action": "click",
    "selector": "AXButton[@AXTitle='New Note']"
  }
]

Move files from Downloads to a project folder in Finder

<think>
Finder file management workflow.
</think>

[
  {
    "action": "shortcut",

    "value": "Finder"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "l",
    "modifiers": [
      "cmd",
      "alt"
    ]
  },
  {
    "action": "type",
    "selector": "AXTextField",
    "value": "~/Downloads"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "return"
  }
]

Arrange two apps side by side for multitasking

<think>
Window management: resize Epistemos left half, Safari right half.
</think>

[
  {
    "action": "shortcut",
    "selector": "activate_app",
    "value": "Epistemos"
  },
  {
    "action": "key",
    "selector": "",
    "value": "left",
    "modifiers": [
      "ctrl",
      "alt"
    ]
  },
  {
    "action": "shortcut",
    "selector": "activate_app",
    "value": "Safari"
  },
  {

    "selector": "",
